Package egovframework.let.cop.com.service.impl

Class EgovBBSUseInfoManageServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl
egovframework.let.cop.com.service.impl.EgovBBSUseInfoManageServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
EgovBBSUseInfoManageService
@Service("EgovBBSUseInfoManageService") public class EgovBBSUseInfoManageServiceImpl extends org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl implements EgovBBSUseInfoManageService
게시판 이용정보를 관리하기 위한 서비스 구현 클래스
Since:
2009.04.02
Version:
1.0
Author:
공통서비스개발팀 이삼섭
